description_long: A seated adult woman is depicted with her legs crossed and hands resting on her knee. She wears a collared, long-sleeve blouse tucked into a knee-length skirt, presenting a professional and composed appearance. Her hair is styled neatly in a bun at the back of her head, with no visible accessories or jewelry. The figure's facial features are calm and neutral, and her posture is upright, suggesting attentiveness or waiting. The clothing fits closely to the body, with subtle fabric folds and creases visible, especially around the elbows and waist. The overall form is realistic, with natural body proportions and detailed anatomical features.
description: A seated adult woman in professional attire with a collared blouse, knee-length skirt, and hair in a bun, sitting upright with legs crossed and hands on her knee.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the blouse, skirt, and the bun hairstyle, with both legs and arms visible.
description_view_1: Left-rear angled view highlighting the side of the face, profile of the bun, and the crossed legs.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the facial features, front of the blouse, skirt, and the positioning of the hands on the knee.
description_view_3: Left side view focusing on the profile of the face, the arm resting on the knee, and the side of the skirt.
attribute_clothing_type: collared long-sleeve blouse and knee-length skirt in a professional style
attribute_posture: sitting with legs crossed and hands resting on knee
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair styled in a bun
